CustomField.formula: IF(NOT(ISBLANK(TECH_DateTimeSelfHelpFinished__c)), FLOOR((TECH_DateTimeSelfHelpFinished__c - CreatedDate) * 1440) + ROUND((((TECH_DateTimeSelfHelpFinished__c - CreatedDate) * 1440) - FLOOR((TECH_DateTimeSelfHelpFinished__c - CreatedDate) * 1440)), 2) * 0.6, null)
CustomField.label: Durée moyenne de traitement en minutes
